steps.title: Match the past date
steps.content: The sentence is anchored to November 5, 2003, and the main clause uses the simple past verb "became." The verb in the "when" clause should match that past-tense event.

steps.title: Keep past tense
steps.content:
• Choice A: "Begins" is present tense, which conflicts with the fixed past date.
  • Choice B: "Will begin" is future tense, which also conflicts with the 2003 event.
  • Choice D: "Has begun" is present perfect and does not fit a specific completed past date.
The answer is C.
